title: Modern Villa
description: A minimalist villa focused on sustainability and natural lighting. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious connection between indoor and outdoor environments.

title: Urban Loft Renovation
description: A complete renovation of a historic industrial space, transforming it into a contemporary urban dwelling while preserving its original character and industrial heritage.

title: Coastal Retreat
description: A stunning coastal residence designed to maximize panoramic sea views while providing shelter from the Mediterranean sun. Natural materials blend seamlessly with the surrounding landscape.

title: Sustainable Office Complex
description: A LEED Platinum certified office complex featuring green roofs, solar panels, and innovative passive cooling systems. The design prioritizes employee well-being and environmental responsibility.

title: Mountain Cabin
description: A contemporary interpretation of traditional alpine architecture, this cabin combines local timber with modern design principles to create a warm, inviting retreat in the mountains.

title: Art Gallery Extension
description: A sensitive extension to a historic art gallery, creating new exhibition spaces that complement the existing building while introducing contemporary architectural elements.
